# Security advisory report template

Thank you for reporting a security vulnerability in hades-system. Please fill out the fields below to help us triage and fix the issue efficiently.

## Severity classification

- [ ] **Critical** (CVSS ≥ 9.0): remote code execution, sandbox escape, mass data exposure
- [ ] **High** (CVSS 7.0-8.9): authentication bypass, significant privilege escalation, sensitive data exposure
- [ ] **Medium** (CVSS 4.0-6.9): denial-of-service, limited data exposure, configuration weakness
- [ ] **Low** (CVSS < 4.0): minor information disclosure, edge-case vulnerabilities

## Reproduction steps

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

Expected behavior: ...
Actual behavior: ...

## Affected versions

- [ ] v1.0.0
- [ ] v1.0.x (specify: ...)
- [ ] main HEAD (commit: ...)

## Suggested fix (optional)

If you have a suggested fix or patch, please describe it here. PR submission is welcome but not required.

## Reporter recognition

- [ ] Public acknowledgment in GHSA advisory (default)
- [ ] CVE attribution (when assignment applies)
- [ ] Anonymity requested

## Additional context

Any environment details, related issues, or upstream coordination notes.
